jsonLd.title: Entry-Level SEO Specialist at Firstcry
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Firstcry. We are on the lookout for a dedicated SEO Specialist to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Firstcry:
Firstcry is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Firstcry!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
